state_before.task: Write a story about Open Source Agentic Frameworks

added.story_text: Elara stared at the blinking cursor, her grand idea for a digital library feeling like an impossible mountain to climb. The sheer architecture of it—user authentication, database management, a responsive interface—was a daunting task for one person. Defeated, she almost abandoned the project until she discovered an open-source framework, a shared digital blueprint crafted by a global community of developers. Suddenly, she wasn't laying every brick by hand; she was working with a sturdy, elegant scaffold. A complex user login system clicked into place with a few lines of code, and a pre-built grid system made her design sleek and functional on any device. When she got stuck, the answer wasn't locked in a proprietary manual but was waiting in a public forum, offered freely by a stranger from halfway across the world. Her project came to life not just from her own effort, but on the shoulders of a thousand invisible collaborators who had built the tools and left them on the path for her to find.
